sandboxsettings_category_constructioncol: Settings that affect how rides and objects can or cannot intersect when being placed.
sandboxsettings_category_economy_descrip: Settings that affect cash flow in your park.
sandboxsettings_category_flatrides_descr: Settings that affect the behaviour and operation of Flat Rides.
sandboxsettings_category_flume_descripti: Settings that affect the operation of flumes.
sandboxsettings_category_guest_descripti: Settings that affect how your guests feel and behave.
sandboxsettings_category_park_descriptio: Settings that affect how your park operates.
sandboxsettings_category_staff_descripti: Settings that affect how your staff feel and behave.
sandboxsettings_category_trackedrides_de: Settings that affect the behaviour and operation of Tracked Rides.
sandboxsettings_category_waterpark_descr: Settings that affect the operation of water park attractions.
sandboxsettings_category_weather_descrip: Settings that affect the climate of your park.
sandboxsettings_setting_breakdownsenable:
Rides and facilities have a higher chance of breaking down the lower their condition is. They will definitely break down if their condition reaches zero.

If disabled, rides and facilities will never break down.
sandboxsettings_setting_coldenabled_desc:
Guests get cold when exposed to low temperatures.

If disabled, guests will no longer get cold.
sandboxsettings_setting_coldmultiplier_d:
Change how often guests seek heaters when exposed to low temperatures.

A higher number in this setting will cause guests to get cold more quickly.
sandboxsettings_setting_crime_descriptio: Toggles whether Guests will commit acts of crime such as Vandalism and Pickpocketing.
sandboxsettings_setting_enablecoastercol:
By default, coaster tracks can intersect with rides or objects, or even with other coaster tracks from the same ride.

If enabled, coaster tracks will not be placeable intersecting with any objects or rides.
sandboxsettings_setting_enableflumecolli:
By default, flumes cannot intersect with any objects or rides, including its own components.

If disabled, flumes will be able to intersect with rides or objects, or even with its own components.
sandboxsettings_setting_enableguestrefun:
If a ride breaks down or a guest leaves the park early due to a negative experience, they may request a refund.

If disabled, guests will never request a refund.
sandboxsettings_setting_enableloans_desc:
Loans are available to give you a little extra cash, but you'll generally need to pay back more than you take out.

If disabled, there will be no loans available and any loans you currently have taken out will be removed without you needing to pay them off.
sandboxsettings_setting_enablepathcollis:
By default, you can place coasters, flat rides, flumes, and scenery that intersect with paths. Path and queue construction is unaffected.

If enabled, you will not be able to build in places that will block guest movement, like building a coaster that intersects with a path. The walkable area around a flat ride is considered a path in this case.
sandboxsettings_setting_enableplayercash:
You have a finite amount of cash to spend in your park, which increases when you earn money and decreases when you spend it.

If disabled, you have an unlimited amount of money at all times.
sandboxsettings_setting_enableplayerrefu:
When you demolish a ride, object, or other item in your park, you are refunded a percentage of that item's cost.

If disabled, you will no longer receive any refund when demolishing an item in your park. Refunds will still be given when using "Undo".
sandboxsettings_setting_enablepoolcollis:
By default, you cannot build rides in places that will intersect with a pool, or a pool's surface as this would block guests.

If disabled, coasters, flat rides, flumes, and scenery can all intersect with pools. Pool construction itself is unaffected.
sandboxsettings_setting_enableresearchtr:
You need to spend research points in the research tree to unlock various park building elements.

If disabled, you will have full access to the entirety of the research tree, without needing to spend any research points.
sandboxsettings_setting_enableridecollis:
By default, flat rides can be placed intersecting with other rides or objects.

If enabled, flat rides will not be placeable intersecting with other rides or objects. This includes the full range of motion that the ride needs while operating.
sandboxsettings_setting_enablescenerycol:
By default, scenery can be placed intersecting with rides or objects.

If enabled, scenery will not be placeable intersecting with rides or objects.
sandboxsettings_setting_enablestaffbreak:
Your staff members need breaks in their working days to keep their morale up.

If disabled, your staff members will no longer need breaks and will be happy to keep working all day.
sandboxsettings_setting_enablestaffmoral:
Your staff members' morale is an indicator of how happy they are to be working in your park. Having breaks and being paid well increases morale, and not having breaks and being paid poorly lowers it. If morale is too low for too long, your staff members might even quit!

If disabled, staff members will no longer have a morale score, and will be happy to work in your park regardless of their pay or breaks.
sandboxsettings_setting_enablestaffpay_d:
Your staff members are paid a salary to perform their jobs.

If disabled, staff members will no longer need to be paid to work in your park.
sandboxsettings_setting_enablestaffquiti:
Your staff members are able to quit their jobs if their morale drops too low for a long enough time period.

If disabled, your staff members will never quit their job regardless of their morale.
sandboxsettings_setting_enableterraincol:
By default, coaster tracks and flume components can tunnel through the terrain, with the right settings. Flat ride placement that would intersect with the terrain is also prevented.

If disabled, coasters, flat rides, flumes, and scenery can all intersect with the terrain. Path and pool construction is unaffected.
sandboxsettings_setting_enableterrainwat:
By default, you cannot build rides in places that will intersect with water in the environment.

If disabled, coasters, flat rides, flumes, and scenery can all intersect with water in the environment.
sandboxsettings_setting_extendedflumelim:
The angle of flume placement is limited to help avoid creating rides with overly sharp corners or steep hills or drops, for example.

If enabled, these limits are extended to give you even more freedom in flume construction.
sandboxsettings_setting_extendedtracklim:
The angle of track placement is limited to help avoid creating coasters with overly sharp corners or steep hills, for example.

If enabled, these limits are extended to give you even more freedom in coaster construction.
sandboxsettings_setting_fairpaymultiplie:
Your staff members have an expectation of what pay is fair for their role. Paying above or below what they think is fair will have an impact on their morale.

This multiplier changes what your staff considers to be fair pay. A higher number means that they will expect more money, and a lower number will mean that they expect less.
sandboxsettings_setting_flatridepowerena:
Flat Rides require power to operate normally.

If disabled, Flat Rides will no longer need power to operate.
sandboxsettings_setting_flumefrictioncon:
Friction on flumes affects how fast guests accelerate down them.

If enabled, friction on flumes can be adjusted through the below slider.
sandboxsettings_setting_globalflumefrict:
Friction on flumes affects how fast guests accelerate down them.

The higher the number in this setting, the higher the base friction level for all flumes.
sandboxsettings_setting_globaltrackfrict:
Friction on tracked rides affects their braking distance and acceleration speed.

The higher the number in this setting, the higher the base friction level for all tracked rides.
sandboxsettings_setting_guestcap_descrip:
The maximum number of guests that arrive in the park each day, depending on Park Rating.

Additional guests will only arrive when a new day begins.

The maximum number of guests that arrive in the park each day, depending on park rating. The limit may be increased past the set amount, if desired. Warning: If your park has a guest cap that exceeds 6000, it cannot be shared cross-platform. Performance may be affected when the guest cap is increased above 6000.
sandboxsettings_setting_guestrefundmulti:
If a ride breaks down or a guest leaves the park early due to a negative experience, they may request a refund.

This slider affects how much money a guest will get when they request a refund.
sandboxsettings_setting_hungerenabled_de:
Guests get hungry over time and need to eat. Very hungry guests will leave the park early.

If disabled, guests will no longer get hungry.
sandboxsettings_setting_hungermultiplier:
Change how often guests get hungry.

A higher number causes guests to need to eat more often.
sandboxsettings_setting_lightning_descri:
During Thunderstorms, Generators and Rides can be struck and damaged by lightning. Guests will also not use pools. 

If disabled, Thunderstorms can occur but will not affect your rides, pools and utilities.
sandboxsettings_setting_litterenabled_de:
Litter is present in your park, and is created by guests and carried in their pockets. Guests either toss litter into a bin, or it randomly falls to the ground.

If disabled, guests will no longer create litter or dispose of litter in bins, and all visible litter in your park will be removed.
sandboxsettings_setting_moodsenabled_des:
Guests have moods based on their experiences in your park, and how they feel about your park  affects your Park Reputation and Park Rating.

If disabled, guests switch to a default mood regardless of what they experience.
sandboxsettings_setting_nauseaenabled_de:
Guests feel nauseous after going on rides with high nausea ratings. If they go over their nausea tolerance, a guests might vomit in the park.

If disabled, guests will never feel nauseous.
sandboxsettings_setting_negativefaciliti:
Guests have negative thoughts and moods when near a facility with a negative area effect, such as a power generator.

If disabled, guests will not be affected by negative area effects.
sandboxsettings_setting_playercashslider: Set your starting cash amount, or choose the amount to reset your cash to using the below Reset Cash option.
Use this setting to instantly set your current cash to the value above.
sandboxsettings_setting_playerrefundmult:
When you demolish a ride, object, or other item in your park, you are refunded a percentage of that item's cost.

This slider affects how much money you receive as a refund when demolishing items in your park.
sandboxsettings_setting_powersupplyenabl:
Rides and facilities require power.

If disabled, rides and facilities do not need power to function.
sandboxsettings_setting_preferencesenabl:
Guests arrive at your park with their own preferences, influencing the attractions they are drawn to and what they enjoy.

If disabled, guests arrive at your park with no specific preferences, and will enjoy everything as it comes.
sandboxsettings_setting_resetresearchtre:
You need to spend research points in the research tree to unlock various park building elements.

Use this setting to reset your current research tree progress. All research that you have currently unlocked will be locked again, and will need to be unlocked using research points.
sandboxsettings_setting_resolveactiveloa:
Loans are available to give you a little extra cash, but you'll generally need to pay back more than you take out.

Use this setting to instantly resolve any loans that you have taken out, without needing to pay them off.
sandboxsettings_setting_ridefacilitycond:
Rides and facilities lose condition over time, requiring servicing and repairs from mechanics.

If disabled, rides and facilities do not lose condition.
sandboxsettings_setting_season_autumn_de: Set the number of days of this season.
sandboxsettings_setting_season_spring_de: Set the number of days of this season.
sandboxsettings_setting_season_summer_de: Set the number of days of this season.
sandboxsettings_setting_season_winter_de: Set the number of days of this season.
sandboxsettings_setting_servicebadgesena:
Rides and facilities receive service badges when serviced, which maintains their condition as long as the service badge lasts.

If disabled, rides and facilities are not given service badges so lose condition as soon as they have been serviced.
sandboxsettings_setting_sunburnenabled_d:
Guests get sunburnt when exposed to sunlight without shade, and each guest gets sunburnt after a different amount of time. Sunburn is prevented by the guest owning suncream.

If disabled, guests will no longer get sunburnt.
sandboxsettings_setting_sunburnmultiplie:
Change how quickly guests get sunburnt when exposed to the sun. Each guest gets sunburn after a different amount of time.

A higher number in this setting will cause guests to get sunburnt faster.
sandboxsettings_setting_temperatureaffec:
Pools will freeze over if they reach extremely low temperatures. 

If disabled, pools will not be affected by temperature.
sandboxsettings_setting_thirstenabled_de:
Guests get thirsty over time and need to drink. Very thirsty guests will leave the park early.

If disabled, guests will no longer get thirsty.
sandboxsettings_setting_thirstmultiplier:
Change how often guests get thirsty.

A higher number causes guests to need to drink more often.
sandboxsettings_setting_toiletenabled_de:
Guests' need to use the toilet increases with time, and increases faster after eating and drinking.

If disabled, guests will no longer need to use the toilet.
sandboxsettings_setting_toiletmultiplier:
Change how often guests need to use the toilet due to time passing.

A higher number in this setting will cause guests to need the toilet more often.
sandboxsettings_setting_trackedridepower:
Tracked Rides require power to operate normally.

If disabled, Tracked Rides will no longer need power to operate.
sandboxsettings_setting_trackfrictioncon:
Friction on tracked rides affects their braking distance and acceleration speed.

If enabled, friction on tracked rides can be adjusted through the below slider.
sandboxsettings_setting_useflumecleanlin:
Flumes get less clean over time, which affects how appealing they are to guests.

If disabled, all flumes stay at maximum cleanliness.
sandboxsettings_setting_usepoolcleanline:
Pools get less clean over time, which affects how appealing they are to guests.

If disabled, all pools stay at maximum cleanliness.
sandboxsettings_setting_usepoolsafety_de:
Pools require safety features like having lifeguards nearby to ensure that they're safe for guests.

If disabled, pools will remain completely safe at all times.
sandboxsettings_setting_vomitenabled_des:
Guests have a chance to vomit when nausea is above their nausea tolerance.

If disabled, guests will no longer vomit, and all visible vomit in your park will be removed.
sandboxsettings_setting_weather_hotsun_d: Enable/Disable this weather event. Weather can be manually overridden in the Weather Forecast.
sandboxsettings_setting_weather_rain_des: Enable/Disable this weather event. Weather can be manually overridden in the Weather Forecast.
sandboxsettings_setting_weather_snow_des: Enable/Disable this weather event. Weather can be manually overridden in the Weather Forecast.
sandboxsettings_setting_weather_thunder_: Enable/Disable this weather event. Automatically disabled when Rain is disabled. Weather can be manually overridden in the Weather Forecast.
sandboxsettings_setting_weather_wind_des: Enable/Disable this weather event. Weather can be manually overridden in the Weather Forecast.
sandboxsettings_setting_weathereffectsen:
Guests prefer sheltered rides in heavy rain, and prefer uncovered rides in sunny weather.

If disabled, guests do not consider weather when making decisions about rides.
sandboxsettings_setting_weathervfx_descr:
Rain and Snow effects are shown on screen during these weather events.

If disabled, no weather visual effects are shown. Snow will still settle in your park.
sandboxsettings_setting_wetenabled_descr:
Guests get wet when exposed to Rain.

If disabled, guests will no longer get wet.
sandboxsettings_setting_wetmultiplier_de:
Change how quickly guests get wet when exposed to rain.

A higher number in this setting will cause guests to seek shelter and Body Dryers more often.
